title: Victor Lamadrid
compiled_truth: Victor Lamadrid is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-13), Victor Lamadrid sent 193 and received 1184 emails, totalling 1377 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (148), [Scott Neal](people/scott-neal) (137), [Scott Goodell](people/scott-goodell) (130), [Clarissa Garcia](people/clarissa-garcia) (122), [Robert Superty](people/robert-superty) (95).
